title: phlegmariurus pithyoides
intro: Phlegmariurus pithyoides, also known as the Japanese climbing fern, is a species of fern in the family Lycopodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in various forms of medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus pithyoides include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Phlegmariurus pithyoides is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
